◎译　　名　大自然在捷克 / Wilder Than Wilderness
◎片　　名　Planeta Česko
◎年　　代　2018
◎产　　地　捷克
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　捷克语
◎上映日期　2018-03-22(捷克)
◎IMDb评分  7.4/10 from 139 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt7956754/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/34809712/
◎片　　长　81分钟

◎简　　介  

　　Near us, in the former mines, on mountain tops, on housing estates and at railway stations nature takes back what man stole. Wildlife film-essay about the resilient power and variety of Czech nature. Within the environment of open cast brown coalmines and spoil tips which is a reminder of a lunar landscape, one finds paradoxically a true tale of an impregnable wild countryside....
